opinion.h1: REALTY ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION v. MONTGOMERY, 296 U.S. 590 (1935)
opinion.h2: REALTY ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION, petitioner, v. Henry G. MONTGOMERY.* No. 152.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. R. Randolph Hicks, of New York City, for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 167.[ Realty Acceptance Corporation v. Montgomery 296 U.S. 590 (1935) ]
